overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player character walks along neon-lit sidewalks, crosses a street with futuristic vehicle traffic, and explores the famous FF:06:B5 golden samurai statue plaza with highly reflective wet pavement and towering cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with metro entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and digital advertisements toward the NIGHT CITY metro entrance

entered.detail: glass and steel entrance structure with illuminated 'NIGHT CITY' signage above the stairs
tall rectangular digital billboard displaying rotating advertisements
tall building facade covered with large glowing digital screens and neon signage
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in front of buildings
yellow and black striped barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet, neon-lit downtown sidewalk at night. The camera moves forward past digital advertising pillars and palm trees, approaching a NIGHT CITY metro entrance with glowing signage. The street is empty of pedestrians and vehicles, with traffic barriers lining the left side and reflective wet pavement capturing the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings.

events.description: yellow sports car drives past from left to right across the intersection
dark sedan passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street while observing the futuristic vehicle traffic passing by

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving through the intersection from left to right
dark sedan passing by on the street behind the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
tall modern street lamp casting bright white light onto the road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open intersection as the camera crosses the street. The crosswalk stripes are clearly visible on the wet asphalt. A yellow sports car drives past from left to right, followed by a dark sedan. The NIGHT CITY entrance and advertising pillars recede into the background as the camera moves into the open street area with overhead street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with the FF:06:B5 golden samurai statue

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to look at the top of the golden statue against the night sky
camera circles around the statue base to view the structure from the opposite side

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive golden statue, examining it from various angles, looking up at its full height, and walking around its marble base

entered.detail: massive golden samurai statue holding a sword with glowing 'FF:06:B5' text on its marble base
dark polished marble tiles with glowing yellow accent lines and uplighting
rectangular planters containing tropical plants and foliage
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising behind the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a grand plaza dominated by the massive golden FF:06:B5 samurai statue. The camera approaches the monument across polished marble flooring with integrated lighting, then tilts upward to reveal the statue's full height against the night sky. The camera circles the base, showing the intricate golden details and the glowing text, while glass office towers rise in the background. The scene ends with the camera moving away from the statue and back toward the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, neon-lit sidewalk into a grand, open-air urban plaza. It begins by moving past digital advertising pillars and palm trees along a wet pavement that reflects the vibrant city lights, approaching a glowing metro entrance. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, the scene opens up to reveal futuristic traffic, including a yellow sports car and a dark sedan gliding across the rain-slicked asphalt. The movement then shifts from the street into a polished marble plaza, where the camera approaches and tilts upward to reveal the towering golden FF:06:B5 samurai statue set against a backdrop of glass office towers. Finally, the camera circles the intricate base of the monument before turning away and retreating back toward the city street.
